name: Calcolatore Area Rettangolo
desc: Calcola area, perimetro e diagonale di un rettangolo.
description: Calcola area, perimetro e diagonale di un rettangolo.
seo_description: Calcola area, perimetro e diagonale di qualsiasi rettangolo. Risultato immediato. Con esempi risolti. Usato da professionisti e studenti in tutto il.
example_label: Calculate area and perimeter of a rectangular room measuring 8.75m by 4.25m for flooring estimation
result_context: The area_m² ({area_m2}) is the totale surface for materials like flooring; perimetro ({perimetro_m}) helps estimate baseboards; diagonal ({diagonal_m}) verifies square corners.
formula_display: Area = Largo × Ancho | Perimeter = 2 × (Largo + Ancho) | Diagonal = √(Largo² + Ancho²)
steps: {'step': 4, 'description': 'Results: 37.19 m² area, 26 m perimeter, 9.74 m diagonal'}
mistakes: Mixing different units (e.g., meters and centimeters) without conversion
Using diagonal formula incorrectly by not squaring both sides first
Forgetting to add waste fattore when ordering materials based on area
